$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5 UTF-8-decode witness: u"€" (raw source bytes E2 82 AC, U+20AC) decodes to ONE UTF-16 code unit 0x20AC. p[0]==0x20AC ? 42 : 1 — returns 42 only when the tokenizer's raw bytes were UTF-8-decoded to a single code unit (not passed through byte-for-byte). Runs on all 4 targets + the release arm.
